task_completion.description: Create a Data Element Group named 'Malaria Testing' with at least two data elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the DHIS2 Maintenance app showing a Data Element Group named 'Malaria Testing' with at least 2 malaria testing-related data elements assigned to it.

task_completion.description: Create a Data Element Group named 'Malaria Treatment' with at least two data elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the DHIS2 Maintenance app showing a Data Element Group named 'Malaria Treatment' with at least 2 malaria treatment-related data elements assigned to it.

task_completion.description: Create a Data Element Group Set named 'Malaria Programme Areas' containing the two created groups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a Data Element Group Set named 'Malaria Programme Areas' that includes both 'Malaria Testing' and 'Malaria Treatment' groups.

task_completion.description: Configure the Group Set as a data dimension.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Malaria Programme Areas' Group Set configuration with the 'Data dimension' checkbox or setting enabled.

task_completion.description: Create a Pivot Table showing the grouped data for Sierra Leone for the year 2023.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the DHIS2 Data Visualizer app showing a pivot table with 'Sierra Leone' selected as the Organisation Unit, '2023' selected as the Period, and the 'Malaria Programme Areas' dimension used in the table layout.

task_completion.description: Save the Pivot Table as a favorite named 'Malaria by Programme Area 2023'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the saved visualization name 'Malaria by Programme Area 2023' at the top of the Data Visualizer interface or in the saved favorites list.

integrity.description: Agent used the DHIS2 web interface to create metadata.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the DHIS2 Maintenance app UI, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent used the DHIS2 Data Visualizer app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine DHIS2 Data Visualizer interface being used to build the pivot table.

integrity.description: Agent used existing genuine malaria data elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data elements added to the groups appear to be genuine DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo data (e.g., mentioning RDT, microscopy, or specific malaria treatments) rather than dummy text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in DHIS2 using the Sierra Leone demo database. The agent must create two Data Element Groups: 'Malaria Testing' and 'Malaria Treatment', each containing at least 2 genuine malaria-related data elements (e.g., RDT, microscopy, positive/negative tests). These must be combined into a Data Element Group Set named 'Malaria Programme Areas' with the 'Data dimension' setting enabled. Finally, a pivot table must be created in the Data Visualizer app using this new dimension, filtered by 'Sierra Leone' (Organisation Unit) and '2023' (Period), and saved exactly as 'Malaria by Programme Area 2023'.
